hub.publicSiteDescription: Live data your landing pages and websites consume.
hub.publicSiteHint: Publish from this page, then connect your site from the Connect tab.
hub.noSlug: Complete onboarding to receive a public tenant slug.
hub.landingDescription: Company marketing site and custom landing pages.
hub.landingHint: Manage the Aryansh company site or build client landing pages in the landing-page project.

connectLink.title: Connect client website
connectLink.description: Setup guide, CORS, env vars, and developer markdown for this tenant.
connectLink.hint: Open the Connect tab for step-by-step instructions to link any client site to Aryansh Tech.

connectorGuide.title: Website developer guide
connectorGuide.description: Full markdown reference: setup workflow, CORS, public API fields, bookings, and troubleshooting.
connectorGuide.hint: Copy this markdown and share it with your website developer. It follows the Aryansh Mesh website integration guides.

integration.title: Client website integration
integration.description: Hand this workflow to your developer. It follows the Aryansh website integration guides for connecting any client site to the API gateway.
integration.howItWorks: Content is managed in Aryansh Mesh, published from this page, then consumed by the client website through public gateway routes — no Firebase credentials on the site.
integration.noOrigins: No website domains registered yet. Add them in Business profile before the client site can call the API from a browser.
integration.devIntro: Proxy API calls through your dev server so the browser stays same-origin and avoids CORS during local development.
integration.corsIntro: Register every browser origin where the client website runs. In Aryansh Mesh → Business profile → Website URL and Website domains (CORS). Changes apply within about one minute.

steps.publish: Publish content from this page so the public snapshot includes products, locations, and business info.
steps.cors: Register every site origin in Business profile → Website domains (CORS), including production URLs and local dev ports.
steps.env: Set VITE_CRM_API_BASE_URL and VITE_CRM_TENANT_SLUG (or NEXT_PUBLIC_*) to the API gateway and tenant slug.
steps.routes: Call only public routes: snapshot, availability, and bookings. No Authorization header on the client website.
steps.verify: Verify with curl or the View snapshot API link — expect HTTP 200 and JSON with products, locations, and meta.publishedAt.

endpoints.snapshot: All published content (business, products, locations, testimonials, custom content)
endpoints.availability: Booked time slots for a date

corsBlocked.fix: Add the exact origin (scheme + host + port) in Business profile → Website domains; wait ~60 seconds.

curlWorks.symptom: Works in curl, fails in browser
curlWorks.fix: curl sends no Origin header — register the browser origin in CRM website domains.

booking403.fix: Enable bookingSettings.enabled on the business profile.

notFound.fix: Nothing published yet — click Publish on this page.

connect.subtitle: Connect this client's website to Aryansh Tech through the public API gateway.
connect.overviewDescription: Use the tabs below to register CORS domains, copy env vars, and share the full developer guide with your client's web team.
connect.noSlugDescription: Complete onboarding for this business before connecting a website.
